one_time_description: Removal of Skwlax Holdings Inc. (formerly wholly owned subsidiary) from consolidation - net book value of capital assets removed
economic_notes: Band owns Skwlax Investments Inc., 0990532 B.C. Ltd., and Skwlax Timber Limited Partnership accounted for on modified equity basis. Subsequent event: fire in May 2022 destroyed hotel portion of lodge at Skwlax Investments Inc., covered by insurance. COVID-19 impacts ongoing. Band operates golf course, RV park, strip mall, industrial park, woodlot, and various natural resource activities.
notes: Audit is qualified because GBE financial statements were prepared under ASPE rather than IFRS as required by PSAS. Skwlax Holdings Inc. was deconsolidated during the year (formerly a wholly owned subsidiary, now accounted for under modified equity basis), which significantly affects comparability - prior year included ~$12M in Skwlax revenues and expenses. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Skwlax Investments Inc., 0990532 B.C. Ltd., and Skwlax Timber Limited Partnership. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $3,547,510 + DFO $56,900 + Province of BC $5,660,858 + NRCan $218,553 + CMHC $153,579 = $9,637,400. Expenses by object show salaries $4,556,305 but segment disclosure payroll shows $4,611,508 - used expenses by object figure. Amortization in cash flow statement is $901,019 but expenses by object shows $1,070,234 (includes GBE amortization); used cash flow/Exhibit B figure for amortization field. No schedule of remuneration provided.
